description: SQS Short Polling Detection Rules — Identifies waste from queues using short polling (receive_wait_time_seconds=0) that generate excessive empty ReceiveMessage API calls

cost.note: SQS Standard Queue pricing: $0.40 per 1 million API calls. Every ReceiveMessage call counts — including empty responses from short polling.

severity_rules.name: short_polling_empty_receives
severity_rules.condition: receive_wait_time_seconds == 0 AND (number_of_empty_receives_avg_per_hour >= empty_receives_per_hour_min OR empty_receives_per_day >= empty_receives_per_day_min)
severity_rules.saving: If empty_receives_per_day is present in Terraform, use (empty_receives_per_day * 30 / 1_000_000) * price_per_million_api_calls_usd; otherwise use (number_of_empty_receives_avg_per_hour * 720 / 1_000_000) * price_per_million_api_calls_usd
severity_rules.description: Queue is configured with receive_wait_time_seconds=0 (short polling) and generating high volumes of empty ReceiveMessage responses. When Terraform includes scenario-level empty_receives_per_day, use that as the authoritative scale for monthly waste. Long polling (wait_time=20s) should reduce empty receives by orders of magnitude versus short polling, even if sampled CloudWatch points are not literally near-zero.
